title: Blumfruit cooler
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Blumfruit cooler''' was an [[Alcohol/Legends|intoxicating]] drink made from the [[Blumfruit/Legends|blumfruit]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. At some point, a group of unruly university students visiting the forest moon drank too much of the beverage and caused quite a snaffu by extinguishing a sacred light lantern hanging from the [[Spirit Tree (Endor)|Spirit Tree]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2001-08-07 -->[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']]
